inputs.label: Building Width (Span)
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal distance from eave to eave across the ridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal distance from eave to eave across the ridge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahyadan saçağa kadar olan toplam yatay mesafe.

inputs.label: Building Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of building parallel to ridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of building parallel to ridge.

inputs.label: Lower Slope Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of lower slope from horizontal, typically steep (60-80°).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of lower slope from horizontal, typically steep (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt eğimin yataydan açısı, tipik olarak dik (60-80°).

inputs.label: Upper Slope Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of upper slope from horizontal, typically shallower (10-30°).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of upper slope from horizontal, typically shallower (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üst eğimin yataydan açısı, tipik olarak daha sığ (10-30°).

inputs.label: Lower Vertical Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical rise from eave to break point where slope changes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical rise from eave to break point where slope changes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saçaktan eğimin değiştiği kırılma noktasına kadar dikey yükselme.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
